intent: Consolidate V222 world-space rain: higher/faster rain, near-field spawn near walls, bath_garden weather-outdoor, bath_main real-door authority; bypass legacy portal/shelter visual view for primary rain.

critical_changes.near_field: Spawn band 0.28-2.55 tiles with front bias fills visible space before nearby walls/hedges.
critical_changes.rain_physics: Rain topZ raised to 6.20, storm topZ 7.55; speed and line length increased to remove feather effect.
critical_changes.bath_authority: bath_garden is weather-outdoor; bath_main remains the only closed building authority and real door.
critical_changes.legacy_bypass: V223 world-rain bypasses V201 visualView/portal and V218 shelter resolver as primary rain gate. Legacy functions remain as fallback code only.

debug_flags_expected: bathGardenWeatherOutdoorV223=true when player is in bath_garden
visual_tests_required: near hedge/wall: rain visible between player and wall, but hidden behind wall
bath garden: rain falls normally outdoors
bath hedge gap: not treated as bath door
bath real door: only real building threshold
rain/storm: faster, higher, no feather effect
bar/yoga/game room: open canopies, no fake doors
known_limits: No browser visual test was executed in container; user validation required.
Particle density may still need artistic tuning after real device/browser test.
